title: Players Explode
description: Players Explode is a chaotic multiplayer mod where getting too close to another player triggers an immediate explosion.
body:
players explode is when players explode. basically you have to social distance. don't occupy the same block and you won't explode.

This was a very quick and dirty datapack (like all of mine are), and literally all it does is make you explode if you get to close to another player.

[https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pZZzsUaG/images/bdfc888326e71598d6906548fde0038725ff6b5c_350.webp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pZZzsUaG/images/bdfc888326e71598d6906548fde0038725ff6b5c_350.webp)
